item.gun_soul.gun_soul_heart.desc: §7Firearms are regarded as proof of faith and can resonate with the gun soul

mode.gun_soul.tooltip.blood_rage: §7Turn pain into power,pay for blood debts with blood
message.gun_soul.fever_end: Let's draw this celebration to a close!
